Name: Jaguar
1Q: From which country does Jaguar Cars Limited come from?
tip1: Jaguar's business was founded as the Swallow Sidecar Company in 1922, but after World War II changes its name.
2Q: Which Jaguar was the world's fastest production car at the time of its launch?
tip2: The XK120 was Jaguar's first world fastest production car, but not the only one.
3Q: In which competition did Jaguar have the most success?
tip3: Jaguar won 7 titles and was the most successful manufacturer between 1950 and 1960.
4Q: Which Jaguar model especially stands out with recognitions for its design?
tip4: Even the great constructor Enzo Ferrari has declared the E-type as one of the most beautiful cars ever made.
5Q: What is the most luxurious line of Jaguar sedans?
tip5: Since 1970 XJ have been Jaguar's flagship four door model.
6Q: What is the biggest difference between the concept and production Jaguars XJ220?
tip6: The concept car has a V12 engine, while the production models have turbocharged V6.
7Q: Which of the following Jaguars is a hybrid car?
tip7: The Jaguar C-X75 supposed to be a production model but only five developmental prototypes were produced.
8Q: With whom Jaguar teamed up in 2008 to design, development, manufacture, and sale of vehicles together?
tip8: Jaguar Land Rover Automotive PLC has been a subsidiary of Tata Motors since it was founded.
9Q: Which engine was added in 2018 as the new entry-level powertrain for Jaguar F-Type?
tip9: F-type with Ingenium AJ200 engine is Jaguar's first four-cylinder sports car.
10Q: What is the first electric car from the Jaguar?
tip10: The Jaguar I-PACE, in its first year, became one of the most highly decorated production cars ever!
